75 E1P E1P_LESS_INTERACT 21p(E1p)Reduced Social Interaction CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of the patient's reduced social interaction. Examples inclue being less talkative, more isolated. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0
